decisions.name: Is_there_an_existing_Allowance_created_for_the_same_Entry_Date
decisions.label: Is there an existing Allowance created for the same Entry Date?

rules.name: Outcome_1_of_Is_there_an_existing_Allowance_created_for_the_same_Entry_Date
rules.label: Outcome 1 of Is there an existing Allowance created for the same Entry Date?

Flow.description: ALN-62 - Created to cater for TOIL transfer of OT ALN-261 - Statement of Service ALN-292 - 1 Unit of Allowance for Penalty Shifts ALN-379 - Bug fix ALN-315 - Updated increased and reduced formula fields to be 0, where null ALN-479 - Update Min Engagement Flag to False on revert to new ALN-512 - In assignment element 'Assign_values', updated 'tc9_pr__Exclude_From_Pay_Batch__c' from TRUE to FALSE. Updated TOIL conversion process to no longer pick up Overtime only. Flow now caters for Payment PTIX over threshold by evaluating all Payment PTIX on the Timesheet and converting excess hours to TOIL. Remove the TSE gate’s dependence on Overtime_Treatment__c = Time Off in Lieu
Flow.interviewLabel: nuuco - Timesheet - Post Transaction Creation Process {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: nuuco - Timesheet - Post Transaction Creation Process

value.stringValue: Payee doesn't have a Time in Lieu Payee Leave Rule
